title: astragalus rhizanthus subsp. rhizanthus
intro: Astragalus rhizanthus subsp. rhizanthus, also known as Huang Qi, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb used for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress and fatigue. The medicinal properties of Astragalus rhizanthus subsp. rhizanthus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus rhizanthus subsp. rhizanthus is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, teas, and tinctures to promote overall health and well-being.
